objective: Verify that the fix for CART-B01 (static import of mkdirSync and synchronous save() function) is correctly implemented and confirm all acceptance criteria are met by running the full gate suite.
key_changes: Verify static import of mkdirSync in src/store/graph.ts
Confirm save() function is synchronous with no await expressions
Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compilation
Run npm test to verify all tests pass including CART-B01 regression guard
